creator: freebsd@sysctl.cz
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #10)
I removed make.conf and rebuild devel/gsoap and without problem but
start virtual is problem. He cannot load kernel module rc -1908

Failed to open a session for the virtual machine BSD32.

The virtual machine 'BSD32' has terminated unexpectedly during startup with exit code 1 (0x1).

Result Code: NS_ERROR_FAILURE (0x80004005)
Component: MachineWrap
Interface: IMachine {85632c68-b5bb-4316-a900-5eb28d3413df}
